view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a unique link per meeting is satisfied as evidenced by the linked use case.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 3 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a unique link per meeting is satisfied as evidenced by the linked use case.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The linked use case explicitly states that the system automatically creates a unique Zoom meeting room and generates a link for each appointment, which is included in the confirmation email. This confirms that the requirement for a unique link per meeting (security) is met, as the link is not reused and expires after the meeting. The evidence provided directly supports the requirement, demonstrating that the system functions as intended.
